title: O-1A criteria auto-classifier from resume + LinkedIn
description: Ingest a candidate's resume and LinkedIn export, then auto-map achievements to USCIS O-1A's eight regulatory criteria with confidence scores and gap callouts.

title: Free 60-second qualification check funnel
description: Top-of-funnel quiz that returns a Go/No-Go O-1A score and captures email; doubles as the primary lead magnet on the marketing site.

title: Petition draft generator with Gemini long-context
description: Stream a full §III petition narrative grounded only in uploaded evidence, with inline citations to exhibits and tracked attorney edits.

title: Evidence vault with CMEK-encrypted Cloud Storage
description: Per-case bucket with customer-managed encryption keys, granular ACLs, and audit logs to satisfy attorney work-product confidentiality.

title: DocuSign attorney sign-off and G-28 packaging
description: Generate the G-28, petition, and exhibits as a single signing envelope so the attorney signs once and the package is filing-ready.

title: Stripe milestone billing (qualify, draft, file)
description: Three-step billing tied to product milestones with auto-pause on attorney hold and pass-through USCIS fees billed separately.

title: Recommendation letter writer with persona prompts
description: Draft tailored letters from each recommender's voice using their CV and relationship to the beneficiary, with explicit attorney edit gates.

title: Exhibit indexer with auto-numbered Bates stamps
description: Auto-name and Bates-stamp every uploaded exhibit, generate a hyperlinked exhibit list, and rebuild the index on reorder.

title: USCIS Case Status polling and Slack/SMS alerts
description: Watch the public case status endpoint for each receipt number and notify the applicant + attorney on every change with diffs.

title: RFE response drafting workflow
description: Ingest the scanned RFE notice, classify the deficiencies, and draft section-by-section responses with new exhibit suggestions.

title: Voice intake via Vapi/Retell for non-native speakers
description: Phone-based intake in 12+ languages that captures biographic data and routes a structured transcript into the case file.

title: Petition diff viewer for attorney revisions
description: Side-by-side diff of the AI draft and the attorney's red-line with accept/reject controls and reasoning notes.

title: EB-1A upsell path from approved O-1A cases
description: Detect O-1A approvals strong enough to support EB-1A and auto-trigger a green card upsell with pre-filled drafts.

title: O-1B expansion for artists and entertainers
description: Adapt the criteria engine and templates to O-1B's extraordinary-ability-in-the-arts standard with industry-specific evidence packs.

title: H-1B cap-season companion product
description: Tier targeting H-1B registrants with employer-side LCA prep and beneficiary document checklist as an annual seasonal SKU.

title: Employer sponsorship portal for HR teams
description: Multi-seat dashboard letting an employer kick off, track, and pay for visa petitions across many employees.

title: University international-student office partnerships
description: White-label dashboard for OPT/STEM-OPT and O-1 transitions, marketed through DSOs at top STEM universities.

title: Lawyer-referral B2B2C marketplace
description: Allow independent immigration attorneys to plug into the platform, get matched to qualified leads, and use Meridian as their drafting OS.

title: Premium attorney-supervised tier at $4,500
description: Higher-touch SKU with named partner review, mock interview, and post-filing concierge for high-risk profiles.

title: Document OCR + structured extraction pipeline
description: Run Document AI on every upload, extract entities (dates, employers, salaries), and pre-populate forms and the case file.

title: Renewal/extension reminder engine
description: Track each beneficiary's status expiration and trigger guided renewal flows 180/120/60 days out.

title: Family-tree document reuse across derivatives
description: Reuse the principal's evidence and biographic data for O-3 dependents and downstream petitions to cut intake by 70%.

title: AILA member discount + integration
description: Co-marketing with the American Immigration Lawyers Association including a sponsor tier and SSO for AILA members.

title: CLINIC accreditation pathway for non-profits
description: Compliance + workflow mode that lets BIA-accredited representatives at CLINIC affiliates serve low-income clients on platform.

title: Form auto-fill across I-129, I-130, I-485, I-765, I-131
description: One canonical case schema that auto-renders any current USCIS form PDF with field-level validation and lock-on-file.

title: ETA-9089 PERM labor certification module
description: Step-by-step PERM workflow including prevailing wage, recruitment, and DOL submission packaging for employment-based GC.

title: Multi-language interview prep simulator
description: Live AI mock consular/USCIS interview in 15+ languages with scored feedback and red-flag warnings.

title: Country-conditions research for asylum cases
description: Auto-compile country-conditions packets from State Department, HRW, and Amnesty sources with citations.

title: Certified translation marketplace integration
description: Built-in routing of foreign documents to certified translators with SLA, price, and chain-of-custody tracking.

title: UPL safeguard layer (non-attorney boundaries)
description: Hard guardrails preventing legal advice in AI outputs to non-attorney users, with required attorney review checkpoints.

title: Privilege log + attorney work-product tagging
description: Tag every document and AI output for privilege and produce a defensible privilege log on demand.

title: Document retention and deletion schedule
description: Configurable retention policies per case type with cryptographic deletion proofs aligned to state bar rules.

title: GDPR-compliant EU resident data handling
description: Regional data residency, DSAR tooling, and DPA templates so European applicants can lawfully use the product.

title: Biometrics appointment scheduling assistant
description: Detect ASC appointment notices, surface earliest available slots, and one-click reschedule when conflicts arise.

title: Court e-filing for immigration court matters
description: EOIR ECAS-compatible e-filing for removal defense and motion practice, gated to attorneys on the platform.

title: Paralegal collaboration workspace
description: Multi-role workspace with task assignment, draft handoff, and an audit trail so paralegals can offload attorney work.

title: Attorney review queue with SLA timers
description: Single inbox showing every draft awaiting attorney review, sorted by filing deadline with SLA breach alerts.

title: Per-case-type document checklists
description: Dynamic checklist driven by visa category and beneficiary profile, blocking submission until required items are present.

title: USCIS fee calculator with current schedule
description: Always-current fee table including premium processing and biometrics, embedded in checkout to prevent surprises.

title: Premium processing eligibility advisor
description: Recommend when to upgrade to I-907 premium processing based on deadlines, employer needs, and current PP windows.

title: Citation linter for petition exhibits
description: Verify every claim in the petition draft maps to an exhibit reference, flagging unsupported or orphaned citations.

title: Press article verifier with archive snapshots
description: Wayback Machine + archive.today snapshots for every press exhibit to guarantee link rot doesn't break the filing.

title: Citation-count enrichment from Google Scholar/Semantic Scholar
description: Auto-pull citation counts and h-index for scholarly criterion, with snapshot date for the record.

title: Patent registry enrichment (USPTO/EPO)
description: Pull patent assignments, citations forward, and family members to strengthen the original-contribution criterion.

title: High-remuneration benchmarks (BLS + Levels.fyi)
description: Build a defensible salary benchmark per role/region so the high-remuneration criterion comes with a methodology page.

title: Concierge dashboard for ops team
description: Internal cockpit showing every active case's blockers, owner, and ETA filed; the single screen ops runs on.

title: Applicant mobile app for evidence capture
description: Native mobile capture for diplomas, contracts, and press, with on-device OCR and direct upload to the case vault.

title: WhatsApp case-update channel
description: Two-way WhatsApp notifications and document upload for international applicants who don't check email.

title: Annual subscription for serial founders/firms
description: Flat annual SKU bundling unlimited extensions, EB-1A, and dependents — sold to repeat customers and small firms.

title: Refer-a-friend with shared discount
description: Two-sided referral giving both parties $250 off, tracked via UTM + Stripe coupon and capped to prevent abuse.

title: Founder community (Slack/Discord) with attorney AMAs
description: Gated community for paying customers featuring monthly attorney AMAs and immigration policy briefings.

title: Public approval-rate transparency page
description: Quarterly published approval, RFE, and denial rates by visa category to differentiate from black-box competitors.

title: Case timeline predictor with USCIS historicals
description: Predict time-to-decision per service center using public processing time data + the platform's own filing dataset.

title: Denial post-mortem generator
description: When a denial arrives, auto-draft a structured post-mortem and a motion-to-reopen viability assessment.

title: Motion to reopen / reconsider drafting
description: Specialized workflow to draft I-290B motions with case law citations and a fresh evidence delta.

title: EB-2 NIW companion module
description: National Interest Waiver workflow with the Dhanasar three-prong framework and evidence templates.

title: Consular processing (DS-260 / DS-160) helper
description: Guided DS-260 / DS-160 completion with embassy-specific document checklists and interview prep.

title: AC21 portability advisor for H-1B/EB
description: Detect when an applicant qualifies for AC21 job portability and auto-draft the supplement-J notification.

title: Travel advisory engine while case pending
description: Per-case travel advisory tracking advance parole, visa stamping risk, and country-of-origin re-entry implications.

title: Advance parole (I-131) one-click filing
description: Once an I-485 is on file, generate I-131 advance parole automatically with biometrics reuse.

title: EAD (I-765) auto-bundle with I-485
description: Default-on EAD bundling with adjustment of status filings, including category-code selection logic.

title: Public-charge analysis for adjustment cases
description: Pre-screen I-485 cases against the current public-charge rule and flag risk factors before filing.

title: I-944 / affidavit-of-support orchestrator
description: Walk sponsors through I-864 affidavit-of-support with tax-transcript pull from IRS and joint-sponsor matching.

title: Form versioning watchdog
description: Daily diff of every USCIS / DOL form PDF; auto-quarantine drafts using deprecated editions.

title: Policy-manual change feed for attorneys
description: Diff the USCIS Policy Manual and AAO precedent decisions, summarize impact, and notify affected cases.

title: AAO precedent retrieval-augmented search
description: Search non-precedent AAO decisions semantically and cite analogous fact patterns inside the petition draft.

title: Tax-transcript pull via IRS Get-Transcript API
description: Pull sponsor and beneficiary IRS transcripts directly with consent to satisfy I-864 and EB-5 requirements.

title: I-9 / E-Verify employer companion
description: Adjacent SKU for employers handling I-9 and E-Verify with the same vault and audit infra.

title: Naturalization (N-400) civics tutor
description: Adaptive civics-test tutor with USCIS-published questions, scoring, and accent-friendly oral practice.

title: DACA renewal assembly line
description: Annual workflow targeting DACA renewals with pre-fill from prior filings and reminder cadences.

title: TPS designation tracker by country
description: Track Temporary Protected Status designations and auto-open registration windows for eligible users.

title: Asylum I-589 narrative builder
description: Trauma-informed I-589 narrative builder with country-conditions linking and one-year-bar analyzer.

title: U-visa / VAWA self-petition support
description: Sensitive-data workflow for U-visa certifications and VAWA self-petitions with vetted advocate review.

title: L-1 intracompany transferee workflow
description: Multinational L-1A/L-1B drafting with org-chart import and one-year-abroad evidence aggregation.

title: E-2 treaty investor business plan generator
description: Generate the E-2 business plan, source-of-funds tracing, and treaty-country eligibility analysis.

title: TN visa quick-turn for Canadian/Mexican pros
description: 48-hour TN packaging optimized for the USMCA professional list with port-of-entry presentation kit.

title: Green-card timing optimizer (priority-date dashboard)
description: Visa-bulletin-aware dashboard showing each beneficiary's priority date, retrogression risk, and filing window.

title: EB-5 investor source-of-funds tracer
description: Document-chain tracer satisfying lawful-source-of-funds requirements for EB-5 with FX rate snapshots.

title: Sponsor employer compliance audit pack
description: Generate the public-access file for H-1B/LCA compliance audits in one click for sponsoring employers.

title: Site-of-employment maps for H-1B amendments
description: Detect material-change worksite events and auto-trigger H-1B amendment drafts.

title: Prevailing-wage determination automation
description: Pull OFLC prevailing wage levels by SOC code and worksite, with appeal-readiness scoring.

title: PERM recruitment ad placement workflow
description: Coordinate the SWA and Sunday-newspaper recruitment ads with evidence preservation and audit-file assembly.

title: Conditional-permanent-resident I-751 reminder
description: Two-year reminder cadence and joint-petition I-751 drafting with bona-fide-marriage evidence packs.

title: Cap-gap and STEM-OPT timeline assistant
description: Auto-detect students hitting cap-gap or STEM-OPT extension windows and surface the filing checklist.

title: Embedded checkout for attorney partners
description: White-label checkout widget partners drop on their site so they take payment under their brand.

title: API for HR systems (Rippling, Deel, Gusto)
description: Publish a partner API so HRIS vendors can kick off visa cases for new hires without leaving their tool.

title: Lever/Greenhouse ATS integration
description: Sync new hires marked as visa-required from major ATS platforms directly into the case pipeline.

title: Concierge SOC2 Type II + HIPAA-aligned posture
description: Achieve SOC2 Type II and HIPAA-aligned controls to unlock enterprise and health-system employer deals.

title: Bias and hallucination eval suite for petition AI
description: Continuously run an eval set of 100+ historical petitions to catch fabricated citations and drift.

title: Attorney-of-record routing across states
description: Auto-route cases to the appropriate state-bar-licensed attorney based on jurisdictional rules and conflicts.

title: Conflicts-of-interest checker
description: Run conflict checks across all prior cases and corporate sponsors before opening a new matter.

title: Trust accounting (IOLTA) for retainer flows
description: Track filing fees held in trust separately from earned fees with monthly reconciliation reports for the bar.

title: Multi-currency pricing for international applicants
description: Show pricing in the applicant's local currency via Stripe FX with country-specific PSP fallbacks (e.g., UPI, Pix).

title: Pay-as-you-go evidence-review tokens
description: Sell granular tokens for one-off attorney spot reviews to applicants doing pro-se petitions.

title: Outcome-tracking and alumni network
description: Track post-approval career outcomes (funding raised, papers published) and showcase as proof points.

title: Petition style-guide enforcer
description: Lint petition drafts against a configurable house style (passive voice limits, citation format, exhibit naming).

title: Multilingual UI with right-to-left support
description: Localize the applicant UI in Spanish, Hindi, Mandarin, Portuguese, and Arabic with proper RTL handling.

title: Voice-of-customer recorder for ops training
description: Optional call recording with consent and PII redaction, used to improve drafts and ops onboarding.

title: Petition export to Microsoft Word with track changes
description: Round-trip the petition to .docx with comments and track changes preserved for attorneys who live in Word.

title: Slack app for attorney inbox + approvals
description: Attorneys triage their review queue and approve drafts inside Slack with one-tap signature pre-staging.

title: Generative cover-letter assembly for filing
description: Auto-draft the filing cover letter and exhibit index sized to the assembled petition, regenerated on any change.
